input.command: curl -s "https://tokens.coingecko.com/uniswap/all.json" | jq '.tokens[] | select(.chainId == 8453) | select(.symbol == "ETH" or .symbol == "WETH") | {symbol, address, logoURI}' | head -20
input.description: Check CoinGecko token list for Base ETH

metadata.description: Check CoinGecko token list for Base ETH
